era_context: Early Iron Age II. Regional powers consolidating: Assyria under Ashurnasirpal II (traditional dating), Egypt under the 21st Dynasty with priestly power in the south, Phoenician city-states expanding trade networks, Western Zhou in China experiencing gradual decentralization.
disconfirming_evidence: No events are confidently documented for this specific year.
historiographic_note: No specific events are reliably attested for 986 BCE. The historical record for this year is negligible.
